entities.title: Carlos Mendez to send Hartfield Group updated security questionnaire responses by April 22
entities.summary: Carlos Mendez committed via email to send Hartfield Group an updated version of the Veridian security questionnaire responses, incorporating 2026 infrastructure changes, by April 22 2026.
entities.raw_excerpt: Carlos (email to Richard Hartfield's IT Director, April 11): 'I'll have the updated questionnaire responses to you by April 22 — we've made several infrastructure changes this quarter that I want to make sure are properly reflected. I'll also include our updated SOC 2 Type II report which just came back from auditors.'

entities.title: Amara Diallo to share Finance Workflow Engine Q3 roadmap with CS team before QBR season
entities.summary: Amara Diallo committed in Slack to share a CS-facing version of the Finance Workflow Engine Q3 roadmap with Priya Sharma's team before QBR season begins in early May.
entities.raw_excerpt: Priya: 'Can we get something from Product that I can actually show accounts in QBRs? Even a rough directional roadmap would help.' Amara: 'Yes — I'll get you a CS-friendly version of what's in the Q3 FWE roadmap. Give me until May 1st, I want to make sure it's cleared with Tom first.' Priya: 'That works, thank you.'

entities.title: Nadia Kovalchuk to include AI pilot ROI data in Series C financial model

source.title: Series C Prep — Finance & CEO sync

entities.summary: Nadia Kovalchuk committed to including the invoice reconciliation AI pilot results (94% auto-match rate, estimated 6 hrs/month saved) as a dedicated slide and financial assumption in the Series C model, to support the 'AI-first operations' narrative.
entities.raw_excerpt: Sarah: 'Investors are going to ask us what AI looks like in our own operations. Can we quantify it?' Nadia: 'Yes — we have real numbers from the invoice reconciliation pilot. I'll build it into the model as a separate section. 94% match rate, six hours saved per month, annualised that's £14K in staff time. I'll have it done before I send the full model.'
